retry_reason: If the VM pointer is NULL, no object is available; retrying with the same NULL would yield the same result. If non-NULL, kref_get unconditionally succeeds, so no failure path exists.
contract_summary: This function is a get-wrapper that retrieves the amdgpu_task_info associated with a given amdgpu_vm and increments its reference count. It returns a pointer to the task_info (or NULL if the VM is NULL). The caller must check the return value; if non-NULL, the caller owns a reference and must release it with a corresponding put (e.g., kref_put or similar) when done using the object. The function does not require any locks to be held — it directly accesses the vm->task_info field, and the get is unconditional on non-NULL vm.
